title: Learn a tip by CS50’s own Carter Zenke on making sure your foundational skills are covered.
summary: Carter Zenke from CS50 offers a tip on ensuring foundational skills are properly covered during learning. The advice addresses a common challenge in technical education where learners may skip or neglect core concepts.
writeup: CS50's Carter Zenke shares a tip for making sure foundational skills are covered while learning technical material. The video addresses a common problem in technical education: learners skip or neglect core concepts and build on gaps. Grounded in the ideas of skill composition and guided learning, it frames foundational skills as the base that later skills compose on top of.
